title: Implement board and runlog sink adapters
description:
Create adapters that implement BoardSink and RunLogSink, wrapping the existing board server and runlog packages.

BoardSinkAdapter wraps *server.Server:
- BroadcastRunEvent maps to server's existing broadcastRunStreamEvent
- WriteEpicStatus maps to runrecord.Store.WriteEpicStatus
- WriteLiveRecord maps to runrecord.Store.WriteLive

RunLogSinkAdapter wraps *runlog.Logger:
- Maps event methods to existing runlog calls (LogIterationStart, LogIterationEnd, LogContextGenerationStarted, etc.)

These are thin adapters — no new logic, just bridging the RunOutput sink interfaces to existing implementations.

Files: internal/output/board_sink.go, internal/output/runlog_sink.go
Tests: verify adapter methods call through to wrapped types.
closed_reason: Created BoardSinkAdapter (board_sink.go) wrapping *server.Server and *runrecord.Store, and RunLogSinkAdapter (runlog_sink.go) wrapping *runlog.Logger. Added public BroadcastRunStreamEvent method on Server to expose the unexported broadcastRunStreamEvent. RunLogSinkAdapter maps flat interface args to runlog's data structs (IterationEndData, RunEndData). BoardSinkAdapter uses type assertions for any-typed params. All 29 output tests pass.
